"'''In Trouble Again'''" is the opening theme from the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']] animated television series. The song was written by [[Stewart Copeland]] of [[Wikipedia:The Police|The Police]] and [[Derek Holt]] of [[Wikipedia:Climax Blues Band|Climax Blues Band]]. In addition to writing the song, Copeland served as its lead vocalist.

==Lyrics==
<poem>
''Steppin' softly in a danger zone''
''No weapon in my hand''
''It's just this brain, designed by man''
''It's got me in trouble again''
''In trouble again''

''I put my life in jeopardy''
''In the service of my friends''
''I wouldn't care but it's a dangerous affair''
''Cause I'm in trouble again, trouble again''
''In trouble, in trouble, in trouble''
</poem>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]''
